since_last: 30% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -4.50% · Gold -3.16% · Nasdaq100 -0.45%. 30% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.07%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -1.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.40%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +4.22%, PUBM +3.65%, UPST +3.54%, RXRX +2.85%, WDAY +2.56%. Laggards: SMR -6.40%, BBAI -6.27%, INOD -6.04%, MDB -5.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.96% at $154.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
